basic_details.job_title: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Manager, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Manager-Civil / Manager Gr.-II-Electrical / Senior Manager-Civil
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) Assistant Manager-Civil / Manager Gr.-II-Electrical / Senior Manager-Civil Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.epi.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the EPI Various Posts Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil (min 55% marks), B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Electrical (min 55% marks)
qualification.details: Assistant Manager-Civil (E-1): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Civil (min 55% marks) Manager Gr.-II-Electrical (E-2): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Electrical (min 55% marks) Senior Manager-Civil (E-4): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Civil (min 55% marks)

salary_details.assistant manager-civil (e-1): Rs. 40,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance
salary_details.manager gr.-ii-electrical (e-2): Rs. 50,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance
salary_details.senior manager-civil (e-4): Rs. 70,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for EPI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

rows.engineering_projects_india_epi: Assistant Manager-Civil / Manager Gr.-II-Electrical / Senior Manager-Civil
B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Civil (min 55% marks), B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent in Electrical (min 55% marks)

content_sections.heading: EPI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the EPI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download EPI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Manager-Civil (E-1): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Civil (min 55% marks) Manager Gr.-II-Electrical (E-2): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Electrical (min 55% marks) Senior Manager-Civil (E-4): B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Civil (min 55% marks)

rows.salary: Rs. 40,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance
Rs. 50,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance
Rs. 70,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for EPI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Engineering Projects India (EPI), a government organization, offering contract-based positions for various managerial roles.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts available are Assistant Manager-Civil, Manager Gr.-II-Electrical, and Senior Manager-Civil, catering to different engineering disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are there?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Assistant Manager-Civil, Manager Gr.-II-Electrical, and Senior Manager-Civil posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for EPI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application is a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates must attend the interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for these positions is scheduled for 13 July 2026. Candidates should report on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech or AMIE or equivalent qualification in Civil or Electrical engineering with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the recruited posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited posts ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month, along with applicable House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this EPI Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the EPI recruitment will be conducted in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact venue address.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Engineering Projects India (EPI)?
faq.answer: The official website for Engineering Projects India (EPI) is https://www.epi.gov.in, where candidates can find more details and updates.
